backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing daily meal records per user with predefined categories and ingredients, supporting adding records and querying ingredients, categories, and user history.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file documenting feature evidence, listing related source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for deployment and URL requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files, describing their purpose and functionality within the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based stylesheet defining OKLCH color variables and theme tokens for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React app and references favicon and app icon assets for the inventory application.
frontend/LIVE_URL.md: Markdown file providing the production app URL along with usage instructions, feature list, and support guidance for end users.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app definition configuring TanStack Router routes and wrapping the app in theme provider and toaster components.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout component providing header navigation, themed container, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/BackendConnectio: Reusable UI card showing backend connection errors with optional details and a retry button.
Exports static predefined ingredient list and categories along with a helper function for category-based filtering.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorDiagnostics.t: Provides status and retry diagnostics for the actor query without modifying useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyForm.ts: Manages ingredient form state, updates fields, validates numeric inputs, and prepares entries for saving.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, including loading, login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines queries and mutations for fetching and saving daily records, including encode/decode helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers and CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React, QueryClient, and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntryPage.tsx: UI for entering and saving daily ingredient balances with validation, copy, and backend connection handling.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays saved daily records with loading, error handling, and navigation to record details.
frontend/src/pages/RecordDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a selected daily record with export, copy, retry, and navigation handling plus loading and error states.
frontend/src/types/dailyForm.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for ingredient form data and saved daily records with numeric fields and timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Converts a SavedDailyRecord into CSV format and triggers a file download with a date-based filename.
frontend/src/utils/recordPlainText.ts: Generates a vendor‑friendly plain‑text summary of a daily record grouped by predefined categories.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, typography, animations, and enabled plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including requirements, features, known issues, and architectural notes.
